description_long: This house features a compact, single-story structure with a prominent gable roof clad in gray shingles. The front facade is defined by a modern, vertically-oriented door flanked by two large rectangular windows, all set within a light tan frame. The lower portion of the exterior walls is finished with a brick pattern, adding texture and visual interest. Triangular transom windows above the door and windows allow additional light into the entryway. The side views reveal the depth of the structure and the continuation of the brickwork and window design. The overall appearance is clean and contemporary, with a blend of traditional and modern architectural elements.
description: A small, single-story house with a gray gable roof, brick lower walls, large windows, and a modern front door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, two large windows, brick base, and triangular transom windows under the gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the gray shingled roof, and a single large window with brickwork below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a similar arrangement to the front but with a solid door and windows, and exposed wooden framing under the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, with a large window and brick base visible beneath the roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Modern vertical door with side windows, brick base, and triangular transom windows under a gable roof
